name: secedgar-mcp-server
description: Query SEC EDGAR filings, XBRL financials, and company data through MCP. STDIO & Streamable HTTP.

interface.shortDescription: Query SEC EDGAR filings, XBRL financials, and company data through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Read-only access to SEC EDGAR: resolve companies by ticker, name, or CIK; run full-text search across filings since 1993; fetch filing document text; and pull historical XBRL financials and frames by friendly concept name or raw tag. Insider (Form 3/4/5) and institutional (13F-HR) holdings are parsed from source, and data-returning tools also stage their full result set as a DuckDB dataframe for downstream SQL. No API keys required.
